{{DISPLAYTITLE:Weltify Pro Clash Season 2}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 |tickername=Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 |shortname=Season 2 |image=Weltify_Pro_Clash_Season_2_allmode.png |icon=Weltify_Pro_Clash_Season_2_allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=Pro Clash |organizer=Welt Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/welt_esports |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=INR|prizepool=500000 |country=India |sdate=2026-03-02|edate=2026-03-04 |rulebook= |twitter= |facebook= |instagram=welt_esports |youtube=@WeltEsports |web=https://www.weltesports.com |discord=ctgCkNmtWc |previous=Weltify_Pro_Clash/2025{{!}}2025 Edition }} ==About== ===Format=== * '''Group Stage''''' February 9th - 11th, 2026 ** 64 teams, 3 matchdays. *** 32 qualified teams. *** 32 invited teams. *** Each group will play 6 matches. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams from each group (Total 48 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|Bottom 4 teams from each group}} are eliminated.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' February 16th - 18th, 2026 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Grand Finals. **{{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' February 23rd - 25th, 2026 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 12 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the Overall Standings advance to the Grand Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' March 2nd - 4th, 2026 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). {{box|start|padding=1em}} ====Points Distribution==== {{Points10|toggle=false|killterm=finish}} {{box|break}} ====Map Rotation==== {{MapRotation|EMREME|margin-top=0}} {{box|end}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=INR |{{Slot|localprize=200000|{{Opponent|victores sumus}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=120000|{{Opponent|meta ninza}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=60000|{{Opponent|revenant xspark}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=30000 |{{Opponent|orangutan}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=20000 |{{Opponent|8bit}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|gods reign}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|nonx esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|genesis esports (indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|vasista esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|team alpha (indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|team h4k}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|vanguard esports}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|learn from past (indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|4tr official}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|rising esports (indian team)}} }} |{{Slot|localprize=|{{Opponent|godlike esports}} }} |adjacentContent= {{AwardPrizePool|localcurrency=INR|exchangeinfo=false |{{Slot|award=MVP|localprize=30000 |{{Opponent|AK|flag=in|team=orangutan}} }} |{{Slot|award=Fan Fav.
